_comment: Result-source gate (2026-06-26). cross_source_strategy_runner SKIPS fixtures here — do not generate predictions that cannot be graded. Seeded from resolution-rate evidence (sports/leagues with ~0% resolution). Re-enable a sport/league by removing it once a result source is wired (e.g. API_SPORTS_KEY for hockey/futsal; scores24 resolver for table tennis).
